text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In preparation for the Satsuki Sho, Fuji Kiseki has
entered the Yayoi Sho. The crowd buzzes with
energy as they wait for her grand entrance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She talks to some fans, gracious and cheerful as
ever, causing yet another person to fall victim to
her irresistible charm.
